headline: SK Hynix weighs 0.5% underwriting fee for blockbuster U.S. share sale
summary: Investing.com -- SK Hynix is considering paying banks underwriting its planned U.S. listing a fee of about 0.5% of the offering proceeds, Bloomberg reported on Saturday, as the South Korean memory chipmaker prepares what could become one of the largest share sales ever.
